name: How to Log Out of Meta Business Suite
description: Learn the simple steps to log out of Meta Business Suite, the all-in-one platform for managing your business operations. Stay secure and protect your data by following our easy guide.
main_title: How to Log Out of Meta Business Suite
richtext:
Here’s how to log out of Meta Business Suite.

‍

1. Start on your Meta Business Suite homepage, which can be found here: https://business.facebook.com/

Click on your business or Page name in the upper left corner

2. Clicking your business or Page name will show you a dropdown menu, where you can see all the Pages you’re currently logged into. Select the Page you want to log out of, and click “Log Out”.

There you have it - you just logged out of Meta Business Suite. If you logged out by accident, you can always log back in! 

‍
